content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 74% deployed with 9 open CNC positions, all held day-0 and with ZERO stop-losses currently set — that is the first problem to fix. Market is broadly bullish today (PSU banks, pharma, power, FMCG all rallying), but VIX at 18.8 plus an open ADANIPOWER limit order stuck for 26+ hours and several existing names sitting on big single-day gains argue for SL installation and trim discipline, not fresh adds. Deployment hysteresis rule applies — priority is position management.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact: Q4 beat, GNPA 1.45%, sell-side targets Rs 88-90. Currently down 3.8% but still above SMA20 (67) and 50DMA (67.5). Installing protective SL at 74 (below recent swing low ~72) and target 88 aligned with analyst consensus. R:R from CMP 78.5 is ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, GNPA 0.93%, Motilal upgrade to Buy, dividend bumped Rs 5→8. Up 1% in our favor already. Install SL at 945 (below today's low ~981 minus buffer / near 20DMA) and target 1080 (below 52w high 1141). R:R ~1:2 from CMP 988."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "new_target": 138.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven ETF; thesis of weak INR + geopolitical hedge intact. Supertrend flagging SELL but structural bullish setup. Install SL 118 (below SMA50) and target 138 for gold leg extension."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 2.6%, broke out to 52-week high on 2.3x volume post Nabha Power CCI approval. Install SL at 1590 (just below yesterday's close / breakout level) to trail into the move. Target 1820 captures momentum continuation. R:R ~1.3:1 — modest but thesis is strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4: PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, highest-ever volumes. Stock at 52w high. Brokerage TPs Rs 1640-1650. Install SL at 1345 (below breakout gap) and target 1520 as first milestone below brokerage TP. Strong conviction on fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong provisional Q4 numbers: deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%. Board 2026-04-27 will declare audited results — catalyst in 4 days. SL at 995 (below recent breakout), target 1140. R:R ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high, 3.7x volume, Q4 results April 29 (catalyst in 6 days). ICICI Direct TP 770. SL at 645 (below SMA20 and recent consolidation), target 760 just under broker TP. R:R ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation play, Q4 results April 30 catalyst. Slight unrealized loss. SL at 2265 (below 20DMA ~2117 is too wide; use 2265 just below today's low - buffer) and target 2550. R:R ~1.7:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 capacity addition 9,619 MW, Q4 results May 15. Stock at 52w high. SL at 385 (below recent swing low 386 buffer), target 435 aligns with analyst TP range. R:R ~1.7:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY LIMIT at 214 still working from 26+ hours ago. Per order hygiene: do NOT stack a duplicate. Also, Power cluster is already heavy in book (TORNTPOWER + NTPC held). Leaving order as-is for this tick; if unfilled by next cycle and power cluster concentration becomes material, will cancel."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 1475 is attractive floor and catalyst strong, but book is 74% deployed with 9 open positions. Deployment hysteresis rule: default to no add. Watchlist — would consider if cash frees up."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish supplementary research: 10 USFDA observations at FTO-3, ANVISA rejections, stock below 200DMA. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CIPLA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish: MarketsMOJO SELL, near 2-year low, USFDA 483s at Goa, Lanreotide disruption. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish research: Prabhudas REDUCE TP 1354 below CMP, PC oversupply headwind, weak Q3. Up 12% today feels like rerun — not chasing."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 12% today, Q4 results April 27. Neutral research. Chasing a 12% gap-up into a binary event with book already deployed = bad R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIENSOL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 9% today, Q4 results drop TODAY. Buying a momentum name at 52w high into a binary print is speculation, not discipline. Power cluster already expressed via TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Fundamentals intact post Q4 beat. Installing protective SL 74 below recent swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, in profit. SL at 945 locks in near-breakeven buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position. SL below SMA50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout in profit; trail SL below breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "reasoning": "Strongest fundamentals in book. SL below gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst April 27. SL below breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst April 29. SL below SMA20 buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "reasoning": "Small drawdown, Q4 April 30. Tight-ish SL to cap loss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Power tailwind intact, Q4 May 15. SL below recent swing."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA (buyback at 1475 = floor; add if cash frees up), ADANIENSOL / ADANIPOWER (await Q4 print today; pending ADANIPOWER order handles cluster exposure), PIRAMALFIN (wait for April 27 print rather than chase 12% gap). DRREDDY and CIPLA dropped — bearish fundamentals. DEEPAKNTR dropped — sell-side REDUCE.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed and ALL 9 positions were sitting without stop-losses — critical risk exposure fixed this cycle with MODIFY installing SLs and targets across the board. Sector cluster check: Power = TORNTPOWER + NTPC (~19% of book) + pending ADANIPOWER BUY = at cluster limit, no new power adds. Financial cluster = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK ~22% — near the 20% cluster caution line, no new financial adds. Unrealized P&L -0.23%, well within daily loss limit. Next cycle priority: review ADANIPOWER pending order (cancel if still unfilled and power cluster at limit), monitor earnings-dense week (AUBANK 27th, GRANULES 29th, HINDUNILVR 30th)."
}
